title: LKH Coat Rack Stand 170cm Steel Hat Stand Coat Stands with 12 Hooks – Clothes Hanger for Jackets, Hats, Scarves, Bags & Umbrellas Space Saving Design Non-Slip Feet-Grey

features: 𝗘𝗹𝗲𝗴𝗮𝗻𝘁 & 𝗗𝘂𝗿𝗮𝗯𝗹𝗲 𝗠𝗲𝘁𝗮𝗹 𝗖𝗼𝗮𝘁 𝗦𝘁𝗮𝗻𝗱: Made from powder-coated steel, this free-standing coat rack offers a stylish yet sturdy solution for hanging coats, jackets, hats, scarves, handbags, and umbrellas. The black coat stand design blends seamlessly into modern and classic interiors, making it a must-have addition to any hallway, bedroom, or office.

𝗦𝗽𝗮𝗰𝗲-𝗦𝗮𝘃𝗶𝗻𝗴 & 𝗣𝗿𝗮𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗰𝗮𝗹 𝗗𝗲𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗻:Whether in a hallway, bedroom, or office, this coat rack stand fits perfectly into compact spaces, keeping your coats, bags, and clothes neatly organized. With its minimalist yet practical design, this standing coat rack is the perfect alternative to bulky wardrobes while adding functional elegance to your space.

𝗦𝘁𝗮𝗯𝗹𝗲 & 𝗦𝗰𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗰𝗵-𝗙𝗿𝗲𝗲 𝗡𝗼𝗻-𝗦𝗹𝗶𝗽 𝗙𝗲𝗲𝘁: Designed with non-slip feet, this heavy-duty coat stand prevents floor scratches while providing steadfast support for your jackets, coats, hats, scarves, and bags. No more worrying about your coat hanger stand slipping or sliding – it stands strong and stable for everyday use.

𝗔𝗺𝗽𝗹𝗲 𝗦𝘁𝗼𝗿𝗮𝗴𝗲 𝘄𝗶𝘁𝗵 𝟭𝟮 𝗛𝗮𝗻𝗴𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗕𝗮𝗿𝘀: Featuring 12 sturdy hanging hooks, this coat tree ensures that your clothes, jackets, coats, hats, and handbags have a secure and accessible place. The free-standing coat stand is ideal for keeping your entryway, hallway, or office clutter-free, making it easy to grab your essentials on the go.

𝗘𝗮𝘀𝘆 𝘁𝗼 𝗔𝘀𝘀𝗲𝗺𝗯𝗹𝗲 & 𝗠𝗼𝗱𝗲𝗿𝗻 𝗔𝗲𝘀𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘁𝗶𝗰: Measuring 48x48x170cm, this clothes rack grey is easy to assemble with a sturdy, well-balanced structure. Its sleek and modern design blends effortlessly with any décor, making it a stylish and functional addition to your home, office, or bedroom.
